description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun!Height: 30 cmWidth: 47 cmDepth: 13 cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one zippered compartment, one inner zipper and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentialsTwo long straps for carrying ease and styleBrand name appliqué d on the front in mettalic studs CareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
